title: 3 Legal Considerations
body_text:
3	Legal Considerations
3.1	Participation Requirement for Financial Institutions
To hold AgriInvest Accounts, Financial Institutions must sign a Participantâs Agreement with Central 1.
To enroll in the AgriInvest Program with Central 1:
Contact Central 1 with your request. See Section 1.4, Contacts and Websites. Central 1 will forward the AgriInvest Program Credit Union Participation Agreement to your Financial Institution.
Review the AgriInvest Program Credit Union Participation Agreement and have it signed by two authorized credit union signatories.
Provide a Financial Institution AgriInvest contact to Central 1.
Mail or courier the original agreement to
Central 1 Credit Union
Payment Services
AgriInvest Officer
1441 Creekside Drive
Vancouver BC V6J 4S8
Central 1 will return a copy of the agreement to the Financial Institution, with Central 1 signatures.
END
